title: Two major Iranian banks suspend services amid US-Israeli war
summary_full: Authorities described the suspended services at two major state-owned banks, Melli and Sepah, as a temporary measure to protect financial stability
summary_public: Authorities described the suspended services at two major state-owned banks, Melli and Sepah, as a temporary measure to protect financial stability

IR.label: neutral
